items.name: fmhy
items.description:
Massive curated directory of tools, software, and online resources.
Organized collection for discovering media, utilities, and digital services.
Acts as a central hub for finding categorized internet resources.

items.name: everythingmoe
items.description:
Curated collection of links and resources focused on internet discovery.
Groups various tools, media sources, and online utilities in one place.
Designed for quick browsing and exploring categorized web content.

items.name: wotaku
items.description:
Wiki-style index of curated internet resources and themed collections.
Focuses on organized discovery of tools, media, and niche content.
Useful for browsing structured lists of categorized online resources.

items.name: internet archive
items.description:
Digital archive preserving websites, books, media, and historical internet data.
Includes the Wayback Machine for viewing past versions of websites.
Useful for research, recovery, and exploring archived digital content.
